title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Moldova will fight against Russian "Shaheds": the country will purchase systems for detecting and intercepting drones, — Infotag Since the beginning of the full-scale war of the Russian Federation against Ukraine, 34 incidents with drones and even ballistic missiles have already been recorded in the airspace of Moldova. The EU allocated a package of €120 million to the country to strengthen its defense. At the same time, Moldova is working with NATO to strengthen anti-drone...
description_en: Moldova will fight against Russian "Shaheds": the country will purchase systems for detecting and intercepting drones, — Infotag Since the beginning of the full-scale war of the Russian Federation against Ukraine, 34 incidents with drones and even ballistic missiles have already been recorded in the airspace of Moldova. The EU allocated a package of €120 million to the country to strengthen its defense. At the same time, Moldova is working with NATO to strengthen anti-drone...
description_uk: Молдова будет бороться с российскими «Шахедами»: страна закупит системы обнаружения и перехвата дронов, — Infotag С начала полномасштабной войны рф против Украины в воздушном пространстве Молдовы зафиксировали уже 34 инцидента с беспилотниками и даже баллистическими ракетами. На усиление обороны ЕС выделил стране пакет на €120 млн. Параллельно Молдова работает с НАТО над усилением противодронной...

title: Attack attack
description: The attack of the Russian Federation destroyed one of the departments of the Sumy Regional Center for Complex Rehabilitation for Children and Persons with Disabilities. Condemning this strike, Andriy Sybiga called on international partners to strengthen the protection of Ukrainian skies. 💬 "Russia has once again demonstrated that there are no moral boundaries for it. When places where children and people with disabilities undergo rehabilitation are targeted, the world has no...
description_en: The attack of the Russian Federation destroyed one of the departments of the Sumy Regional Center for Complex Rehabilitation for Children and Persons with Disabilities. Condemning this strike, Andriy Sybiga called on international partners to strengthen the protection of Ukrainian skies. 💬 "Russia has once again demonstrated that there are no moral boundaries for it. When places where children and people with disabilities undergo rehabilitation are targeted, the world has no...
description_uk: Атака РФ зруйнувала одне з відділень Сумського обласного центру комплексної реабілітації для дітей та осіб з інвалідністю. Засуджуючи цей удар, Андрій Сибіга закликав міжнародних партнерів посилювати захист українського неба. 💬 "Росія вкотре продемонструвала, що для неї не існує жодних моральних меж. Коли мішенню стають місця, де проходять реабілітацію діти та люди з інвалідністю, світ не має...

title: 🫠Scientists have discovered another "side effect" of COVID: the...

description: 🫠Scientists have discovered another "side effect" of COVID: the nerves of the eyes are damaged in people infected with the virus, — Nature Communications At the same time, a routine examination by an ophthalmologist may not show any problems. People may have light sensitivity, rapid eye fatigue, blurred vision, pain when working at a computer, and headaches for years. Special studies showed a decrease in density...
description_en: 🫠Scientists have discovered another "side effect" of COVID: the nerves of the eyes are damaged in people infected with the virus, — Nature Communications At the same time, a routine examination by an ophthalmologist may not show any problems. People may have light sensitivity, rapid eye fatigue, blurred vision, pain when working at a computer, and headaches for years. Special studies showed a decrease in density...
description_uk: 🫠Ученые обнаружили еще одну «побочку» COVID: у людей, перенесших вирус, повреждены нервы глаз, — Nature Communications При этом обычный осмотр у офтальмолога может не показать никаких проблем. У людей могут годами сохраняться светочувствительность, быстрая усталость глаз, затуманивание зрения, боль при работе за компьютером и головные боли. Специальные исследования показали снижение плотности...

description: Update: Ukraine strikes 3 Russian shadow fleet tankers on Black Sea, Zelensky says. title: Casualties reported
description: MARCH. Stress test. Conditions close to reality — medical classes for operators of the 3rd SSO regiment. Tactical medicine is a skill that must become a reflex. For SSO operators, mastering the MARCH protocol is the basis on which life depends. In real combat, there will be no time to think, so we create conditions where decisions are made automatically. That's why we conduct these stress tests. A tight dark space,...
description_en: MARCH. Stress test. Conditions close to reality — medical classes for operators of the 3rd SSO regiment. Tactical medicine is a skill that must become a reflex. For SSO operators, mastering the MARCH protocol is the basis on which life depends. In real combat, there will be no time to think, so we create conditions where decisions are made automatically. That's why we conduct these stress tests. A tight dark space,...
description_uk: MARCH. Стрес-тест. Умови, наближені до реальності — заняття з медицини операторів 3 полку ССО. Тактична медицина — це навичка, що має стати рефлексом. Для операторів ССО опанування протоколу MARCH є базою, від якої залежить життя. У реальному бою не буде часу на роздуми, тому ми створюємо умови, де рішення ухвалюються автоматично. Саме для цього ми проводимо ці стрес-тести. Тісний темний простір,...

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
description: 2 Russian tankers struck on Black Sea, Ukraine's General Staff says. The reported overnight attacks come as Ukraine ramps up its long-range drone attacks across Russian-occupied territories and deep inside Russia, in an attempt to slowly grind down Russia's war machine from afar.

title: Kyiv: 41 missiles + 125 drones launched

title: Mykolaiv: 40 missiles launched
description: During that night, Russia carried out one of the most massive ballistic attacks on Kyiv. The enemy fired more than 40 missiles of various types, most of them at the capital, and 120 attack drones. As of now, in Kyiv and in the region, one person is known to have died, and another 16 were injured. My condolences to all relatives and friends. All victims are provided with the necessary medical assistance. In three locations continues...
description_en: During that night, Russia carried out one of the most massive ballistic attacks on Kyiv. The enemy fired more than 40 missiles of various types, most of them at the capital, and 120 attack drones. As of now, in Kyiv and in the region, one person is known to have died, and another 16 were injured. My condolences to all relatives and friends. All victims are provided with the necessary medical assistance. In three locations continues...
description_uk: Протягом цієї ночі Росія здійснила одну з наймасованіших балістичних атак на Київ. Ворог випустив понад 40 ракет різних типів, з них більшість по столиці, та 120 ударних дронів. Станом на зараз у Києві та в області відомо про одну загиблу людину, ще 16 отримали поранення. Мої співчуття всім рідним та близьким. Усім постраждалим надається необхідна медична допомога. На трьох локаціях продовжується...

title: 18 missiles + 108 drones launched
description: 41 rockets and 125 BpLa were launched by Russia this night, — Air Force Among them: 10 "Zirkonov", 25 ballistic "Iskanderov-M"/S-400, three "Onyx" and three X-59/69. The main direction of the attack was Kyiv. Air defense managed to neutralize 18 missiles and 108 drones. At the same time, 23 missiles and 10 strike drones were hit at 20 locations.
description_en: 41 rockets and 125 BpLa were launched by Russia this night, — Air Force Among them: 10 "Zirkonov", 25 ballistic "Iskanderov-M"/S-400, three "Onyx" and three X-59/69. The main direction of the attack was Kyiv. Air defense managed to neutralize 18 missiles and 108 drones. At the same time, 23 missiles and 10 strike drones were hit at 20 locations.
description_uk: 41 ракету и 125 БпЛа запустила русня этой ночью, — Воздушные Силы Среди них: 10 «Цирконов», 25 баллистических «Искандеров-М»/С-400, три «Оникса» и три Х-59/69. Основным направлением удара стал Киев. ПВО удалось обезвредить 18 ракет и 108 беспилотников. При этом зафиксированы попадания 23 ракет и 10 ударных дронов на 20 локациях.

description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 126 ЦІЛЕЙ: 18 РАКЕТ ТА 108 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 19 липня (з 18:00 18 липня) противник завдав масованого комбінованого удару по Україні із застосуванням ударних БпЛА, ракет повітряного та наземного базування різних типів. ❗️ Основний напрямок удару – Київ. Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 166 засобів повітряного нападу – 41 ракету і 125 БпЛА...

description: Ukraine reportedly strikes Russian oil depot in Stavropol Krai, hits targets in occupied Crimea, Luhansk. Ukrainian forces struck an oil depot in Russia's Stavropol Krai and hit several targets in the occupied territories overnight on July 19, monitoring channels reported.
